primary.name: Deep Forest Green
primary.usage: Navbar, Hero headings, Primary buttons, Footer

secondary.name: Vibrant Green
secondary.usage: Hover states, Category icons, Accent elements

design_elements.borderRadius: rounded-3xl (large) for cards, rounded-xl (medium) for inputs
design_elements.shadows: shadow-sm for cards, shadow-lg for primary buttons
design_elements.button_style: High padding, bold text, transition-all duration-300
